I saw Aimer live a couple years ago at Tokyo Dome Stadium 🏟 which was absolutely incredible and unforgettable. She’s been strutting her stuff since she was young. At the end of the last encore she bowed onstage soaking up the applause 👏🏻 She was given a thunderous ovation. I remember she took part in a three thousand metre race several months ago where she came first. She rose to the occasion, ran for all she was worth and dived over the finish line 🏁 passing the runner 🏃🏻‍♀️ who was ahead of her earlier. Hundreds of people congratulated her for winning the race as she held up the trophy 🏆 The race was the opportunity for all the world’s best runner 🏃🏻‍♀️ to strut their stuff. It was truly memorable.
